data.title: Caduceus Software Systems Corp. (OTC: CSOC) will showcase McLovin's Pet Brand at SUPERZOO 2025 in Las Vegas.
data.description: Caduceus Software Systems Corp., the parent company of the rapidly expanding natural pet food brand McLovin's, disclosed its attendance at SUPERZOO 2025, a prominent pet industry trade show in North America. The event is scheduled to take place from July 31, 2025.

data.title: TPx named a Top Employer 2025 in the US by Top Employers Institute, a leading managed services provider.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, on July 31, 2025, TPx, a prominent managed services provider across the country, has been acknowledged as a Top Employer 2025 in the United States by the esteemed Top Employers Institute, a global leader in recognizing exemplary people practices. This prestigious accolade highlights TPx's commitment to excellence in employee management.

data.title: SandboxAQ releases AQtive Guard to combat security threats from non-human identities. PALO ALTO, CA, July 31, 2025.
data.description: With an increase in credential-based attacks, AQtive Guard from SandboxAQ now offers security teams comprehensive protection, visibility, and automated measures for non-human identities and cryptographic assets. This solution is now widely accessible to the public, providing crucial support in combating cyber threats. This announcement comes from PALO ALTO, Calif., on July 31, 2025.

data.title: Marchex's AI agent product, Engage for Auto Sales & Service, wins 2025 AI Agent Product award, boosting revenue & operational excellence.
data.description: Seattle-based Marchex (NASDAQ: MCHX) has been recognized by TMC as the recipient of the 2025 AI Agent Product of the Year Award for its Marchex Engage for Auto Sales & Service solution. This technology utilizes AI and conversational intelligence to enhance revenue generation and operational efficiency. TMC, a prominent global media company, acknowledged the innovative capabilities of Marchex Engage for Auto Sales & Service in driving remarkable business outcomes. This accolade highlights Marchex's commitment to pioneering AI solutions that elevate performance and productivity in various sectors.

data.title: Aurora Innovation CFO to speak at Oppenheimer conference on August 11 and Canaccord Genuity conference on August 13, 2025.
data.description: Aurora Innovation, Inc. (NASDAQ: AUR) revealed that David Maday, the CFO, will engage in fireside discussions at two upcoming investor conferences. The first is the Oppenheimer 28th Annual Technology, Internet & Communications Conference on August 11, 2025, scheduled for 10:45 am Eastern Time. The second will be at the Canaccord Genuity 45th Annual Growth Conference on August 13, 2025, set for 8:30 am Eastern Time. The sessions can be viewed via webcast on Aurora’s investor relations site at ir.aurora.tech.

data.title: Ferrous Systems partners with SOAFEE to enhance Rust in software-defined vehicles, offering safety solutions.
data.description: A company specializing in Rust-based software solutions for embedded and safety-critical systems, Ferrous Systems, revealed its participation in the Scalable Open Architecture for Embedded Edge (SOAFEE) program. This initiative aims to establish open, cloud-native software standards for software-defined vehicles (SDVs) and embedded edge systems. By joining SOAFEE, Ferrous Systems, renowned for its proficiency in Rust and safety-critical tooling, including Ferrocene, contributes its expertise to this global, industry-led collaboration.

data.title: Enterprise LLM spend doubles to $8.4B; Anthropic surpasses OpenAI as leader, with 32% usage vs OpenAI's 25%. Google at 20%.
data.description: A new report by Menlo Ventures reveals that enterprise spending on large language models (LLM) has more than doubled in six months, increasing from $3.5 billion in late 2024 to $8.4 billion. The 2025 Mid-Year LLM Market Update, based on a survey of 150 technical leaders in AI startups and large enterprises, indicates a rapidly maturing market where inference now supersedes training. The report highlights a dramatic shift in market leadership, with Anthropic overtaking OpenAI as the leading enterprise foundation model API provider, capturing 32% of enterprise usage, compared to OpenAI's decreased share of 25%. Google has also made significant gains, holding 20% market share. Additionally, Meta's Llama holds 9% and DeepSeek follows with 1% of LLM API usage. This data marks Anthropic's remarkable rise despite OpenAI's prior dominance. This information underscores the strategic decisions made by teams as they prioritize performance in choosing vendors within the evolving LLM market.

data.title: Lazlo 326 debuts integrated lottery platform in U.S. pilot with national retailer. U.S. lottery market over $100 billion/year.
data.description: A tech company called Lazlo 326, focused on revolutionizing lottery sales, has introduced a trial version of its in-lane and mobile lottery system with a major national retailer. This move signifies a groundbreaking step in the U.S. market as the first time a versatile, cloud-based lottery solution has been seamlessly incorporated into current retail checkout processes and mobile setups. The U.S. lottery sector sees over $100 billion in annual revenue, with the majority, over $90 billion, generated through in-person transactions. However, the market continues to rely on outdated systems.

data.title: FCS partners with T-Mobile to use IoT for water conservation, saving millions of gallons of water for utilities.
data.description: In Bellevue, Washington, T-Mobile (NASDAQ: TMUS) revealed a new partnership with Fluid Conservation Systems (FCS), a top company in advanced leak detection technology. FCS has chosen T-Mobile to improve cellular connectivity for their acclaimed acoustic monitoring solutions. Through T-Mobile for Business Internet of Things (IoT) services and the strongest mobile network in America, FCS aims to offer water utilities across the country valuable insights that help conserve millions of gallons of treated drinking water, benefiting the environment and communities.

data.title: American States Water Co (NYSE: AWR) raises quarterly dividend by 8.3% to $0.504 per share, annualized at $2.016. 357th consecutive dividend payment.
data.description: American States Water Company, listed as AWR on the NYSE, announced on July 29, 2025, its Board of Directors approved a boost in their third quarter cash dividend per share, from $0.4655 to $0.5040. The annual dividend rate post-increase is $2.016 per share, marking an 8.3% rise from the earlier $1.862 per share rate. This move signifies the 357th continuous dividend payment by the company.

data.title: NYSE provides pre-market update. Figma's IPO values it at over $19 billion. Kristen Scholer reports on July 31.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) shared its latest pre-market update, delivered by Kristen Scholer from the NYSE Trading Floor. This report offers valuable market insights to help traders prepare for the day ahead. Stay informed with the daily pre-market update from NYSE, featuring key information to guide your trading decisions each day.

data.title: 1754 Properties purchases Marriott Winston‑Salem in NC, marking their new investment in the state.
data.description: Recent data reveals that the unemployment rate in the US has dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in 18 months, with the economy adding 531,000 jobs in October. This exceeds economists’ expectations of 425,000 new jobs. These numbers suggest a strong recovery from the impacts of the pandemic, with various sectors contributing to job growth. The addition of jobs across industries, including hospitality, healthcare, and professional services, is a positive sign for the overall economic outlook. Despite inflation concerns, this significant job growth indicates a promising trend in the labor market.

data.title: Seed Coating Global Market Forecast to 2032 | Polymers Lead the Market - Enhanced Seed Protection and Advanced Agricultural Practices Drive Growth - ResearchAndMarkets.com
data.description: A report titled "Seed Coating Market Size, Share & Forecast by Type, Active Ingredients, Crop Type - Global Forecast to 2032" has been introduced to ResearchAndMarkets.com. The market is experiencing growth due to various factors including the increasing need for affordable crop protection solutions. Factors such as technological advancements, emphasis on seed treatment, reduction in arable lands, and the need to improve crop productivity are contributing to this growth. Additionally, there is a rising demand for cost-effective options compared to hybrid and genetically modified seeds. This signifies a shift towards more sustainable practices in agriculture.

data.title: Qwik Life Marketplace partners with female founders to offer hemp-infused beverages post 2018 Farm Bill legalization.
data.description: In Chicago on July 31, 2025, Qwik Life Marketplace announced a collaboration with female founders to introduce high-quality hemp-infused beverages. Following the legalization of hemp in the US by the 2018 Farm Bill, entrepreneurs began utilizing hemp-derived THC, such as Delta 9, in the production of edibles and beverages. This partnership signifies a growing trend in the industry, with notable numbers of female entrepreneurs capitalizing on the opportunities presented by the expanding market for hemp-infused products.

data.title: Midland Industries acquires Cerro Brass to enhance brass offerings and supply chain capabilities. Acquisition announced on July 31, 2025.
data.description: In Kansas City, Missouri on July 31, 2025, Midland Industries, a company owned by Gemspring Capital and specializing in industrial pipe, valve, and fittings products, revealed their acquisition of Cerro Brass from Cerro Flow. This acquisition marks a significant move in the industry, consolidating expertise and resources.

data.title: NPA recognizes 2025 Pawn Industry Award winners for leadership, innovation, and dedication in the industry.
data.description: In Victor, New York, on July 31, 2025, the National Pawnbrokers Association (NPA) has revealed the winners of the 2025 Pawn Industry Awards. These accolades honor exceptional leadership, innovation, and commitment in the pawn sector, highlighting individuals who have excelled in their contributions to the industry.

data.title: Sky Bliss launches new skincare and baby giftsets on Amazon on July 31, 2025. The collection offers premium, innovative products.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, in Miami, Sky Bliss introduced its new line of skincare cosmetics and baby gift sets available for purchase on Amazon. The brand aims to enhance self-care practices with top-tier products designed to improve daily routines. The collection includes a range of innovative, high-quality essentials tailored to meet specific needs.
WSJ's Timiraos: Core PCE inflation is beginning to look no better, and by some measures worse, than where it was when the Fed started to cut last year.

data.title: A3's Humanoid Robot Forum on September 23 in Seattle to discuss future of manufacturing with humanoid technologies. Register at https://www.automate.org/events/humanoid-robot-forum.
data.description: In Ann Arbor, Michigan, the Association for Advancing Automation (A3) is hosting the Humanoid Robot Forum on September 23, 2025, at the Sheraton Grand Seattle. The event aims to bridge the gap between concept and production of humanoid robots. Registration for the forum is currently open at https://www.automate.org/events/humanoid-robot-forum. Experts in the industry will gather to discuss the integration of humanoid robots with machine vision and artificial intelligence. This one-day forum is a valuable opportunity to delve into the future of automation and robotics.

data.title: Opera introduces agentic browsers to boost web efficiency after 30 years of passive usage, aiming for massive productivity gains.
data.description: In Oslo, Norway, on July 31, 2025, Opera, a web pioneer listed on NASDAQ under the symbol OPRA, announced a significant development after three decades of web browsers serving as passive gateways to the internet. Users have shouldered the burden of navigating, copying, and pasting across numerous tabs and applications during this time. Opera is now addressing this issue by...
